Sql.ChronicFollowups: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM <visit_table> WHERE <visit_date_column> = ? AND <clinic_or_service_column> IN (<chronic_values>)
Sql.NcdDmPatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT <person_or_patient_id_column>) FROM <diagnosis_table> WHERE <diagnosis_date_column> = ? AND <icd10_column> LIKE 'E1%'
Sql.NcdHtPatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT <person_or_patient_id_column>) FROM <diagnosis_table> WHERE <diagnosis_date_column> = ? AND <icd10_column> LIKE 'I1%'
Sql.NcdDmHtPatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT <person_or_patient_id_column>) FROM <diagnosis_table> WHERE <diagnosis_date_column> = ? AND (<icd10_column> LIKE 'E1%' OR <icd10_column> LIKE 'I1%')
Sql.NcdBpScreened: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT <person_or_patient_id_column>) FROM <visit_table> WHERE <visit_date_column> = ? AND (<sbp_column> IS NOT NULL OR <dbp_column> IS NOT NULL)
Sql.NcdFbsScreened: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT <person_or_patient_id_column>) FROM <lab_table> WHERE <lab_date_column> = ? AND <lab_name_or_code_column> IN (<fbs_lab_codes>)
Sql.MissingDiagnosis: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM <visit_table> v LEFT JOIN <diagnosis_table> d ON d.<visit_key> = v.<visit_key> WHERE v.<visit_date_column> = ? AND d.<visit_key> IS NULL
